meaning: n.两人一起,一队,两人玩的游戏
examples: He and John make a nice twosome.
Not every sign is delirious about being part of a perfectly matched twosome.
MICHAEL We do everything as a twosome, from sharing our commute to working out to eating lunch.
The twosome spent 2009 crafting the story of Bionic Yarn and its (since patented) manufacturing process.
It is comprised of teams of four, who play as twosomes against a different twosome each day.
